name: TRANSACTION CO.,Ltd.
summary: TRANSACTION CO.,Ltd. plans, designs, manufactures, and sells consumer products. The company offers eco-miscellaneous goods, including bags and tumbler bottles; wellness products that include electronic and heated cigarettes, and beauty products, as well as products suitable for health maintenance, management, and prevention, such as masks, wet tissues, and cooling sheets; and character licenses and PB development. It also provides travel related products and pet wear, and related products; designs and sells personal humidifiers and desks; and designs and produces miscellaneous entertainment goods, such as concert goods and pop-up stores. In addition, the company offers event and sales promotion products, notebooks under the Moleskine brand, and support for sales promotion; and operates VAPE.SHOP, a site for individual users. It operates in Japan and internationally. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
